name: ai-pixel-counter
description: AI-Based Object Pixel Counter using Semantic Segmentation

scripts.build: python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt || pip install -r requirements.txt || echo 'Pip failed'
scripts.dev: python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 3000 --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.headless true --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
scripts.start: python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 3000 --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.headless true --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
